caption: A white sports car is parked on a paved driveway next to a grassy area with green foliage. The rear of the vehicle features a spoiler and the word "VETTE" on the left side, with a license plate ending in "WTR" and the alphanumeric text "L98057" visible on the lower right bumper. The car's driver-side door is open, revealing a brown leather interior. As the sequence progresses, the camera pans and shifts perspective, moving from a close-up of the rear fascia to a view of the car's side profile. The final view focuses on the open door and the rear quarter panel, highlighting the contrast between the white exterior paint and the brown interior upholstery. No people are visible in the frames.
